# Instant Strata Elements

> UI element library for the Instant Strata strata-management platform.
> Components are owned source (shadcn distribution, Base UI primitives).
> Each element's full agent docs live at registry/<name>/<name>.md.

## Elements

### actions
- [agent-action](registry/agent-action/agent-action.md): Trigger an AI agent to handle a workflow task with a pre-written prompt
- [button](registry/button/button.md): Trigger an action (submit, confirm, CTA)
### data-display
- [audio-player](registry/audio-player/audio-player.md): Play a strata meeting or voice recording with scrubbing, skip controls, and jump-to-timestamp sync
- [stat](registry/stat/stat.md): Show a headline KPI number with a trend
- [transcript-viewer](registry/transcript-viewer/transcript-viewer.md): Show word-by-word transcript text synced to AudioPlayerProvider playback
### layout
- [widget](registry/widget/widget.md): Frame a dashboard panel or list of summary rows
